name: agent_req_state_guide
description: Guide the client through the full agent REQ implementation checklist states (S01 through S16). The wrapper should pass current_state via arguments.current_state. Call with no current_state to get S01; call with current_state to get the next record. Terminal state is end_agent_req (is_end true)—not generic end; pass it back to stay at terminal. Legacy current_state end is accepted as alias for end_agent_req. Other recognized states: S01–S16 substeps as documented. Unknown non-empty states return error. Response includes selected record fields plus state, guidance, is_end.

current_state.description: Current state supplied by the wrapper as arguments.current_state. Omit or pass an empty string to receive S01. Unknown non-empty states return error.
